messages.content: You're chatting with PRISM-4, a chat AI by Nexus Research. It's equipped to provide guidance on a wide variety of topics. Today's discussion is about DIY projects.
Hello PRISM-4! I'm getting into some DIY work around the house. I've been thinking of building a small shed in my backyard.
That sounds like an exciting project! Building a shed can be a great way to learn new skills and add value to your home. Do you have a plan or know what materials you'll need?
I've thought about it a bit. I'll need lumber, screws, a proper toolset, and maybe even some paint. There's something else I need help with though...
